findings.description: Canonical hook pattern: useEffect + event listener + cleanup. Structural template for useUpdateChecker.ts.
Exact template for UpdateBanner: Chakra Alert + CloseButton, local dismissed state via useState, data-testid on banner root and dismiss button.
Simpler dismissible banner (no re-show logic). Action button + dismiss pattern.
Only existing visibilitychange listener. useEffect + document.addEventListener('visibilitychange') + cleanup.
Only setInterval in codebase — transient wait-for-readiness poll, NOT a recurring background check. No recurring setInterval precedent exists.
Only window.location.reload() call — user-action triggered (post-restore), not polling-related.

key_patterns: Dismissible banner: Chakra UI Alert + CloseButton, local useState('dismissed'), early return null when dismissed. data-testid on banner root and dismiss button.
Hook with event-listener cleanup: useEffect registers listener, returns removeEventListener.
visibilitychange: document.addEventListener in useEffect + removeEventListener in cleanup (BackupContext.tsx:53-56).
setInterval: no recurring background-poll precedent — useUpdateChecker will be the first.

findings.description: No build-time env vars set. No env block. NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION must be added via env: { NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION: execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD') } with timestamp fallback.
build target runs npm run build only. No post-build version.json step. Must add: echo '{"version":"$(BUILD_VERSION)"}' > out/version.json after npm run build.
deploy: single lftp mirror -R --parallel=4 with no ordering guarantees. version.json races with chunk uploads.
Only favicon.ico and robots.txt. No version.json. Post-build Makefile step writing to out/ is cleaner than public/ (avoids committing generated file).

Provider hierarchy: AppThemeProvider → ChakraProvider → LanguageProvider → ProfileProvider → NostrIdentityProvider → MarmotProvider → Layout → Component. useUpdateChecker() mounts cleanly inside AppShell.
6 hooks: useDecryptedImage, useDirectReactions, useImageSend, useMoodTheme, useOnlineStatus, useThemeStyles. New useUpdateChecker.ts fits here.
6 contexts. None are relevant to update-checking. Checker is a self-contained hook.

explorers.build_system: Make orchestrates build and deploy. npm run build inside app/ → out/ static export. NEXT_PUBLIC_* vars baked into JS at build time. Deploy: lftp mirror -R --parallel=4 from out/ to FTP host. No CI — manual make deploy.
explorers.deploy_ordering_risk: Single lftp mirror passes version.json and chunk files in parallel. A polling client may see the new version hash before the new JS chunks are present — fix: two sequential lftp sessions, mirror --exclude version.json first, then upload version.json last.

implementation_decisions.NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION_injection: In next.config.mjs, add execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD').trim() with Date.now() fallback in try/catch. Set as env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BUILD_VERSION.
implementation_decisions.version_json_emission: Makefile post-build step writes directly to app/out/version.json. Not in public/ (avoids committing generated file).
implementation_decisions.BUILD_VERSION_variable: Makefile: BUILD_VERSION := $(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || date +%s). Passed as env var to npm run build AND used for version.json write.
implementation_decisions.deploy_sequencing: Split deploy into: (1) lftp mirror --parallel=4 --exclude version.json, (2) lftp put version.json last.
implementation_decisions.useUpdateChecker_placement: Hook at app/src/hooks/useUpdateChecker.ts, called inside AppShell in _app.tsx.

unit_test_conventions: No jsdom, no @testing-library/react — no DOM environment
React hooks mocked with vi.mock('react', ...) or logic extracted to pure functions
Global APIs mocked with Object.defineProperty(globalThis, ...) or vi.fn()
explorers.e2e_route_interception_pattern: page.route('**/version.json**', handler) — Playwright matches against full URL so '**/version.json**' covers http://localhost:3000/version.json?t=... No existing page.route() in codebase; this is the first use.
explorers.e2e_fast_suite: No E2E_GROUPS flag needed. Filename must not start with groups- or dm-.

findings.description: baseURL defaults to http://localhost:3000. fullyParallel:false, workers:1. No existing route interception config.
Vitest, no environment key (Node default). '@' alias to app root. include: tests/unit/**/*.test.ts.
Pattern: vi.mock('react', ...) to test hook logic without DOM. Or extract pure comparison/latch logic for direct testing.
Reference: page.evaluate() with window bridge. Alternative for update-checker: page.route() interception is cleaner.
